description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden shelving unit with a mid-century modern design, featuring a rich brown finish and visible wood grain patterns. The front face displays a series of open shelves of varying sizes, ideal for storing books, decor, or small items, and a single drawer at the bottom with a small metallic handle. The sides and back are solid panels, providing structural support and a clean, minimalist appearance. The unit stands on four tapered legs, giving it an elevated and elegant stance. The craftsmanship suggests it is both decorative and functional, suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies. The overall look is sturdy yet stylish, blending practicality with aesthetic appeal.
description: A tall, narrow wooden shelving unit with open shelves, a bottom drawer, and tapered legs in a mid-century modern style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wooden panel and two tapered legs, with no shelves or drawer visible.
description_view_1: Front view revealing multiple open shelves of different sizes and a single drawer with a handle at the bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing a solid wooden panel and two legs.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wooden back panel and the tops of the four legs.
